string-array.name: wheel_advice
string-array.item: A cheek or forehead kiss — a gentle gesture without words. Pick a calm moment when you are together.
Give a sincere compliment about character or looks. Be specific and warm in your tone.
Plan an unhurried date: a walk, coffee, or sunset picnic. Focus on attention and warmth together. Snap a keepsake photo.
Hug for a minute without words. Physical contact eases tension and brings you closer.
Prepare a small surprise: a note, a favorite treat, or a playlist. It does not have to be expensive — care matters.
Write a short letter or message about what you value in your partner. Send it at an unexpected moment.
Play a favorite song and dance together at home. Laughter and lightness are great ways to bond.
Share a small secret or dream — it strengthens trust and emotional connection.
